description: Create a country-level dataset summarizing megacities (population > 5 million) using the country boundaries from /home/ga/GIS_Data/ne_110m_admin_0_countries.geojson and populated places from /home/ga/GIS_Data/ne_110m_populated_places.geojson. For each country, calculate the count of megacities and the total population of those megacities (sum of POP_MAX). Export the resulting dataset as a GeoJSON file to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/megacity_stats_by_country.geojson.
